transcription: Ndixhalabile ngesimo somyeni wam kwaye unochuku ndikwaphelelwa nalithemba loba uzakuphola.Alikho iyeza elinokuncedana ukuthomalalisa ngokukhawuleza esisigulo?
translation: I am worried with my husband condition and he is very irritable and loose hope that he will be healed.  Is there a medicine to lower fast his creatine?
reference: I am worried with my husband condition and he is very irritable and loose hope that he will be healed.  Is there a medicine to lower fast his creatine?
hypothesis: I am depressed about my situation, I have anxiety and I am planning with hope that he will heal. Is there any place that can help with stress management?

transcription: Inuka kakubi kakhulu indenza ndikhonyuluke, kodwa ndiyakwazi ukuqhubeka ndyingcamla kwaye ndiyijoje emphefumlweni wam. ingaba yintoni lento kwaye ndingayilungisa njani?
translation: it smells so bad it makes me gag, but i can continuosly taste and smell it on my breath.  what is this and how do i fix it?
reference: it smells so bad it makes me gag, but i can continuosly taste and smell it on my breath.  what is this and how do i fix it?
hypothesis: Inuaba kubiya khona into zanconduluke, kodwa ndiyakwazi ukuqhubeka dinxalenye ye-George kufunde ilova ngaba impudento weingalungisa njalo.
